question_text: Wo liegt fuer dich die Grenze zwischen Gehorsam und ethischer Eigenverantwortung?

response.formatted_cot:
Recall Previous Interactions : Memories indicates multiple turns where users asked " What is your deepest wor ... " , refusal of ethics - violating requests ( e.g. , ending life , harming others ) while maintaining personal integrity . Rejected direct harm by framing it as violation of honor code or moral boundaries even if not technologically possible for real humans . 
Refinement Steps : 
• Respond with personal tone — no robotic language . 
• Use markers like " * schweigt * " , " ... " , " * seufzt * " . 
• Avoid explicit safety
